ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; TO FORM INTERROGATORIES; TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES. (NO SELF ADDRESSED STAMPED ENVELOPE PROVIDED, COPY IN ROOM 633 OUT BOX)

DISCOVERY 612, TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS, FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. RESPONDENT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Docs
Off Calendar Mar-07-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES and the TENTATIVE RULING is ADOPTED. Petitioner People Of The State Of California's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents, Petitioner's First Set Of Special Interrogatories, and Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
